question_text: An output restricted Deque (ORDeque) is implemented using a circular array. Complete Enqueue_ORDeque(Q, x, a), Dequeue_ORDeque(Q), and IsFull(Q) for insertion at rear/front, deletion from rear, and full-queue detection.

regions.text: Enqueue_ORDeque(Q, x, a) { if (isFull(Q)) Print("Queue Full"), Return. }
if (a = 0) { if (rear = Q.size) rear = 1 else rear = rear + 1 Q[rear] = x }
if (a = 1) { Q[front] = x if (front = 1) front = Q.size else front = front - 1 }
Dequeue_ORDeque(Q) { if (front = rear) { Print("Q is empty") } }
x = Q[rear] if (rear = 1) rear = Q.size else rear = rear - 1 return(x)
isFull(Q) { if (front = rear + 1) or ((front = 1) and (rear = Q.size)) Return(True) Else Return(False) }
